elements.original_description: A white envelope with a red stamp floats diagonally downward on a pure white background. A yellow arrow follows its path, emphasizing continuous movement. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a white envelope with a distinct red stamp, floating on a diagonal downward path against a pure white background. A bright yellow arrow closely follows its trajectory, emphasizing a sense of continuous and dynamic movement. Clean flat vector art style, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp lines, absolutely no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
